penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Implement flow context verification: require cross-reference
penalty_rules.condition: Implement flow context verification: require cross-reference with insider activity, earnings proximity, and put/call ratio analysis before assigning NEXUS scores above 85. Add momentum confirmation requirement for OTM strikes >3% requiring 2-3 day technical consolidation above entry level.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Implement a bearish momentum filter that reduces NEXUS score
penalty_rules.condition: Implement a bearish momentum filter that reduces NEXUS scores by 15-20 points when technical indicators show sustained selling pressure. Require scores above 75 to pass secondary validation examining recent price action and sector headwinds before allowing high-conviction entries.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Require NEXUS scores >75 for strikes >3% OTM, combined with
penalty_rules.condition: Require NEXUS scores >75 for strikes >3% OTM, combined with 2-3 day momentum confirmation (consecutive positive price action) before entering deep OTM positions.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Require NEXUS scores ≥75 for any options position with strik
penalty_rules.condition: Require NEXUS scores ≥75 for any options position with strike >3% OTM from current underlying price. Additionally, mandate momentum confirmation (2+ consecutive days of positive price action) before entering deep OTM calls.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Require NEXUS scores >75 for OTM calls needing >4% underlyin
penalty_rules.condition: Require NEXUS scores >75 for OTM calls needing >4% underlying moves to reach profitability, plus 2-3 consecutive days of positive price momentum confirmation before entry.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Implement minimum NEXUS score threshold of 65/100 for any di
penalty_rules.condition: Implement minimum NEXUS score threshold of 65/100 for any directional trades. Scores below 65 should be automatic passes to avoid marginal conviction positions that lack statistical edge.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Learned filter: Minimum NEXUS score of 65+ for OTM options, with mandatory p
penalty_rules.condition: Minimum NEXUS score of 65+ for OTM options, with mandatory position size reduction (25% normal size) for scores 50-60. Add IV percentile filter rejecting entries above 75th percentile without confirmed near-term catalysts.
penalty_rules.reason: Committee identified this as a filterable loss pattern

penalty_rules.name: Pattern: wrong_direction
penalty_rules.condition: 4 trades failed due to wrong direction. Momentum signal is not reliable enough alone.
penalty_rules.reason: Require UOA flow confirmation before entering momentum-only trades. Add volume-weighted direction check.
